title: MC Console 666 Edition
description:
Play your childhood game!
-What?
-Something is wrong..?
body:
# [MX6] Console 666 Edition

**This modpack wants to make it so it looks and feels like old Console Editions of the game but something happened you got a Diffrent version of the game cause you bought it on a fair cause it was cheaper then the other places and then you played it but strange things happened while you played the sun was diffrent and something felt strange..? There were players that joined your world randomly real strange huh?**

---

A Cursed Nightmare Hidden in Legacy Console Minecraft
Step into [C6] Console 666 Edition, a horror-infused modpack that twists the nostalgic charm of Legacy Console Minecraft into something dark, corrupted, and deeply unsettling. Inspired by the eerie myths of haunted game cartridges and glitch-ridden lost versions, MX6 brings a terrifying experience where the game itself seems to resist your presence.

What if your old discs wasn’t just scratched, but cursed? MX6 captures the essence of an abandoned, corrupted version of Console 360/PS3 one that was never meant to be played. The once-familiar UI flickers, chunks of the world dissolve into code-ridden voids, and unexplainable figures watch from the darkness.

 The Broken Script – A Game That Wants to Break You
At the core of C6 lies The Broken Script, a glitched, unstable codebase
